subtitle: Collective work on education in carceral contexts from a gender perspective
details: Participated in socio-educational work with incarcerated women, including teaching, participatory methodologies, collective self-evaluation, and the systematization of organizational experience. Coordinated community and institutional networks and represented the collective in Premio Azul a la Creatividad Estudiantil, XXIV edition (2022).

institution: Faculty of Social Sciences, Universidad Diego Portales
subtitle: School for Women Leaders in Socio-environmental and Territorial Issues | Supervisors: Evelyn Arriagada and Antonia Zambra
details: Elective internship in a project focused on socio-environmental and territorial inequalities.
